---
title: "Appendix"
---

Appendix
  
  
  
  
  
  
  
  

**Appendix**

***References***

**Fourier Series**: *W. Bolton***

**Advanced Engineering Mathematics**: *Erwin Kreyszig***

**Matlab 6.1 help system**

*Ibid*

*Ibid*

*Ibid*

*Ibid***

Loughborough University Website: Engineering Mathematics – “**Calculating Centres of Masses**” Page 5 :  HYPERLINK "http://learn.lboro.ac.uk/olmp/chap15/15_3.pdf" http://learn.lboro.ac.uk/olmp/chap15/15_3.pdf

**A Real-time Depth Detection System using Monocular Vision:** *Y.L. Murphey, J. Chen, J. Crossman, J. Zhang*

**Electronic speckle photography: increased accuracy by nonintegral pixel shifting**: *M. Sjodahl***

***Bibliography***

**The Image Processing Handbook**: *T. Russ***

**Accuracy in electronic speckle photography:** *M. Sjodahl***

**Whatis.com: Mathematical Symbols: **http://whatis.techtarget.com/definition/0,,side9_gci803019,00.html
